content:
I am an Assistant Professor of Science Education in the College of Education at the University of Houston. My research investigates preservice and in-service science teachers’ noticing, and power dynamics interact to shape the teaching practices in science learning spaces.
I am currently accepting doctoral students. See the Research page for what I’m working on.
Education 2024 · Ph.D. in Science Education, University of Georgia 2019 · B.S. in Physics, East China Normal University Professional Experience 2026 – Present · Assistant Professor, University of Houston 2024 – 2026 · Postdoctoral Scholar, University of California, Irvine 2024 – 2024 · Postdoctoral Scholar, University of Georgia 📧 hi@yuxihuang.com is the best way to reach me.

title: About

content:
Some things I love outside of work.
Kendo I started practicing Kendo in 2024, and I’d like to pursue it as a lifelong journey.
Movie I love watching movies in my spare time, especially East Asian films. I enjoy spending time at independent movie theaters and attending film festivals.
